item.name: Factset Holders of a Company or Fund

request.name: Factset Holders of a Company or Fund

description.content: Holders of a company or fund

query.description: Controls the Asset Type of the data returned
Controls the Holder Type of the data returned

Limits the number of holders returned based on their Market Value position in the security.  
Default is ALL, otherwise use a valid number above 0.
Top Holders as of date expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to latest month-end close; non-month-end dates are converted to month-end dates.

response.name: Expected response; returns JSON data containing STACH 2.0 row organized package format
